app.name: Liem Monorepo
app.description: An opinionated monorepo starter for building consistent, production-ready products.

home.headline: A starter that keeps agents aligned from spec to ship.
home.subhead: Liem gives every new product a clear plan, a consistent interface, and a focused path from first idea to first release.
home.stackHeading: Built on tools you already know

features.heading: Everything wired, nothing generic
features.subheading: The starter makes the decisions once, so each product builds features instead of boilerplate.

items.title: Typed end to end
items.detail: Shared Zod contracts in packages/types keep the web and server from drifting.

items.title: Clean boundaries
items.detail: Apps stay thin, packages stay shared, and imports cannot cross the lines by accident.

items.title: Design pre-wired
items.detail: Tailwind tokens, shadcn, and a retuned reference button ship configured, not generic.

items.title: Fast by default
items.detail: Turborepo caching, server components, and small client islands out of the box.

foundations.heading: One system, from the first route onward
foundations.subheading: The starter sets the conventions so every page stays consistent as the product grows, instead of drifting screen by screen.

items.title: Plan first
items.detail: Settle scope and structure before the first screen.

items.title: Stay consistent
items.detail: Every new page reuses the same system and patterns.

items.title: Ship focused
items.detail: Launch with one clear next step for the user.

cta.heading: Start your next product on a foundation that holds.
cta.subheading: Scaffold once, then build features with the conventions already in place.

footer.description: An opinionated monorepo starter for building consistent, production-ready products without the boilerplate.

features.title: Features go here
features.description: This route is scaffolded so the primary navigation points somewhere real. Replace it with the product's features page.

pricing.title: Pricing goes here
pricing.description: This route is scaffolded so the primary navigation points somewhere real. Replace it with the product's pricing page.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Auth runs through Supabase Auth. Build the real sign-in form here. A product would also give auth routes a focused auth layout instead of the marketing shell (see docs/engineering/FRONTEND.md).

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Auth runs through Supabase Auth. Build the real sign-up form here. A product would also give auth routes a focused auth layout instead of the marketing shell (see docs/engineering/FRONTEND.md).

contact.title: How can we help?
contact.description: This route is scaffolded so the header support link points somewhere real. Replace it with the product's support or contact page.

notFound.title: This page could not be found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have moved.

states.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
